title: TAPPaaS Organization
description: An Organization is the top level of the 3-level People hierarchy (Organization -> Group -> User). The name is used as the Authentik tenant identifier. See ADR-007 P1 (ADR-007a).

name.description: Slug identifier, used as the Authentik tenant identifier. Identity key.

owner.description: Reference to User.name that owns this organization.

parentOrg.description: Optional reference to a parent Organization.name (e.g. a hosting relationship).
